mnemonics.title: PCMS - Bitcoin Transaction Types
mnemonics.content:
**P**2PKH (Pay to Public Key Hash) - standard
**C**oinbase - mining reward, no inputs
**M**ultisig - M-of-N signatures required
**S**egWit (P2WPKH) - witness separated

mnemonics.title: Ethereum Tx Types: VCD
mnemonics.content:
**V**alue transfer (ETH between accounts)
**C**ontract creation (deploy new contract)
**D**ata call (message to existing contract)

mnemonics.title: P2SH = Simple Address, Complex Script
mnemonics.content:
Sender sees: simple hash address (starts with 3)
Spender reveals: full redeem script + signatures
Complexity shifts from sender to spender

mnemonics.title: HTLC: Hash + Time = Atomic Swap
mnemonics.content:
**H**ash lock: need secret to claim
**T**ime lock: deadline to claim
**L**ightning Network uses these
**C**ross-chain swaps enabled
